summary: Replaced the finally-block worktree teardown in bin/lib/run.mjs with a catch-and-rethrow that logs preservation and only calls removeWorktree on the success path. createWorktreeIfNeeded already reuses an existing worktree directory, so a re-invocation after a thrown error resumes in place. Added tests covering the no-finally invariant, the catch+rethrow shape, and the reuse-on-existing-dir path.
